title: Adidas Hoodie — Dark Grey
image_captions: Dark grey hoodie with 'EVEN' logo on chest and Adidas logo on sleeve cuff.
Dark grey hoodie with 'EVEN' logo on chest and Adidas logo on sleeve cuff.
Back view showing white Adidas logo and Five Ten '10' logo on dark grey sweatpants.
Close-up of grey hoodie showing white 'AVEN' logo with layered line design on chest. Neck tag visible at top.
Neck tag reading adidas Size UK S US S F S I S CDN S/P MADE IN CHINA
Vertical tape measure showing 69cm at the hem edge of dark grey sweatshirt material.
Horizontal tape measure showing 50cm at the garment's edge.
Neck tag showing '271' and '100% Cotton'. Care label reading '100% Cotton'. Visible seam with loose threads.
enhanced_description:
Adidas EVEN Hoodie — Dark Grey
Brand: Adidas
Size: S (UK/US)
Condition: Good
Composition: 100% Cotton
Color: Dark Grey

Measurements (Laid Flat):
Pit-to-Pit: 50cm
Length: 69cm

About the Piece
A sleek, dark grey Adidas EVEN hoodie featuring a stylish layered line design on the chest. Crafted from premium 100% cotton for a soft, comfortable fit that layers perfectly with your everyday style.

Style Note: Streetwear / Minimalist Urban

Key Detail
The hoodie showcases the iconic white 'AVEN' logo with its signature layered line graphic on the front, paired with an Adidas logo on the sleeve cuff. The garment is made in China and features a visible seam with loose threads near the neck tag area.

Seller Notes
Shipping: 🚀 Next day shipping guaranteed!

Shop My Closet: Check out my other offers for more Adidas items—I'm happy to offer bundle discounts if you see something else you like!

Questions? Drop a comment or send an offer. I'm responsive and ready to ship.
